banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Lukas Weber, a German citizen aged 17, whose primary (Haupt-) residence is registered in Berlin, applying in person at a Bürgeramt for his first-ever Personalausweis (he has never held either a Personalausweis or a Reisepass before). He is a minor, so his legal guardian must submit the application; his parents share custody but live apart, and only his mother is attending today, so his father's written consent and identity document must accompany the application. He was not recently naturalised, his personal data matches the population register (aside from having no prior document at all), and he does not belong to a religious community requiring headwear in his biometric photo. He had his photo pre-taken at a certified studio and will collect the finished card at the Bürgeramt. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to apply: a German citizen, which is the sole eligibility gate this document models for the Personalausweis service.

reasons.requirement: Must be a German national (PAuswG §1 Abs. 1)

collectedValues.label: Last name
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — identification confirms the applicant's registered personal data

collectedValues.label: First name(s)
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — identification confirms the applicant's registered personal data

collectedValues.label: Date of birth
collectedValues.sourceRef: Gültigkeit des Personalausweises — validity period derives from age at issuance

collectedValues.label: Is this Berlin dwelling your primary or secondary residence?
Have you never held a German Personalausweis or Reisepass before?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — "falls Sie noch nie ein Dokument wie beispielsweise einen Personalausweis oder einen Reisepass hatten"

collectedValues.label: Does your current personal data (e.g. name) differ from what is on the population register?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — "falls Ihre Angaben... von den Daten abweichen, die im Melderegister gespeichert sind"

collectedValues.label: Were you naturalised and are applying for German documents for the first time?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — "Wenn Sie eingebürgert wurden und erstmals deutsche Dokumente beantragen wollen"

collectedValues.label: Is the applicant under 18?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Voraussetzungen — "Bei Minderjährigen vor Vollendung des 16. Lebensjahres..." (general minor/guardian rule)

collectedValues.label: Do the applicant's legal guardians share custody but live apart, with only one attending today?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — "muss eine schriftliche Einverständniserklärung des nicht anwesenden Elternteils vorgelegt werden"

collectedValues.label: Do you belong to a religious community whose rules require you not to appear in public without headwear?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — "Gehören Sie... einer Religionsgemeinschaft an, die... nicht ohne Kopfbedeckung zu erscheinen"

collectedValues.label: How will your biometric photo be provided?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Erforderliche Unterlagen — "1 aktuelles, digitales biometrisches Passfoto (Neue Regelung ab 01.05.2025)"

collectedValues.label: How would you like to receive your identity card?
collectedValues.sourceRef: Gebühren — direct mail is a paid add-on; pickup is the default

documentsProvided.reason: neverHeldGermanIdOrPassport is true: a mock birth certificate (Geburtsurkunde) for Lukas Weber is presented
applicantIsMinor and separatedGuardianConsentRequired are both true: the absent father's mock written consent declaration plus his identity document (for signature comparison) are presented

documentsNotApplicable.reason: genuinely optional ("falls vorhanden"): a first-time applicant with no prior Personalausweis or Reisepass has none to present

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (de/bmi/national-identity-card-application). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to any Bürgeramt or other government system. A human (the applicant's legal guardian, for a minor applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and attend the in-person appointment themselves with the original supporting documents before this application can proceed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
